body_txt: Instantly Proven Wrong is a comedic device where a character confidently asserts something, only to have reality swiftly and decisively contradict them. Also known as the "and then the opposite happens" joke. This trope thrives on the rapid and often embarrassing exposure of the character's misguided belief, boast, or prediction. It's a quick turn of events, usually played for laughs or irony, as the universe or circumstances conspire to immediately reveal the falsehood in their statement. A form of Hypocritical Humor . May result in an attempt at Verbal Backspace , Last-Second Word Swap , or Implausible Deniability . Compare with:
